programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Bunny mistakenly gets an egg instead of a ball while playing football. Later, everyone is taken aback when the egg starts cracking.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey Bunny and companions pursue a naughty mouse, leading to unexpected complications. Consequently, they find themselves entangled in a predicament within a rat's underground dwelling.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: The professor is traumatised by Bunny's quirky answers in class. Later, Honey, Bunny and the gang feast on a scrumptious dinner at a wedding reception.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey is furious after the bank refuses to allow him to withdraw his money. Later, Honey and Bunny are surprised to find a bouquet at their doorstep.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: A fun visit to a nearby museum spells disaster for Honey and his gang of animal friends after an ancient mummy returns to haunt the gang.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and his mother visit the station and await the arrival of the train. Later, Shin-chan forces Misae to take him to a washroom.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan brushes his teeth with new toothpaste and eats unhealthy snacks right after. As a result, Misae is left infuriated and she berates him.

programme.title: Shin Chan

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak receives an invitation to his boss's home, but not merely for a simple visit. So, his boss asks his help in investigating the strange occurrences happening at his house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena looks forward to the picnic as the rest of Gokuldham packs their bags. Will this getaway bring new memories for everyone?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members pack their bags and embark on their bungalow picnic with fervor. But, they are unaware of the twists that await them on their road trip.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members finally reach the bungalow, looking forward to three days of relaxation. However, their getaway might turn spooky, just as Taarak's boss suspected.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members relax and have a picnic at the bungalow. But, something spooky may happen that could ruin their peaceful time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal calls Bagha to find out why he sent Bhide an insulting message. Later, Bagha clears up the confusion.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Nattu Kaka and Bagha believe that their magical rings are changing their luck. Later, they decide to make Jethalal wear a ring too.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha and Nattu Kaka desperately try to prove the authenticity of the magical ring to Jethalal. In the meantime, Popatlal asks Bagha to order one ring for him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Shortly after meeting a girl who could be his ideal bride, Popatlal loses his magical ring. Soon, Popatlal is devastated when the girl rejects him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal cannot believe his luck as Popatlal loses his ring. In the aftermath of the loss, Popatlal's fortunes take a turn for the worse.

programme.desc: Jethalal finally caves in and decides to wear the ring. Soon, he begins to experience a radical change in fortunes.
